Sub 'RodaScript' if &IsWeb <> true msg(&sql, status) Endif
If &sql.IsEmpty() &sql = &Mensagem do 'Atualiza' Else do 'Atualiza' sql [!&sql!] EndIF commit &sql = ''
if &IsWeb <> true msg('EXE. SUCESSO', status) Endif EndSub

//Frotas &sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'Viagens') CREATE TABLE [Viagens] ( " &sql +="[EmpCod] INT NOT NULL, " &sql +="[FilCod] INT NOT NULL, " &sql +="[ViaCod] INT NOT NULL, " &sql +="[ViaDes] VARCHAR(100) NULL, " &sql +="[ViaDtaSai] DATETIME NULL, " &sql +="[ViaDtaChe] DATETIME NULL, " &sql +="[VeiCod] INT NULL, " &sql +="[ViaPlaCar1] VARCHAR(8) NULL, " &sql +="[ViaPlaCar2] VARCHAR(8) NULL, " &sql +="[ViaPlaCar3] VARCHAR(8) NULL, " &sql +="[PesCod] INT NULL, " &sql +="[ViaValFre] DECIMAL(17,2) NULL, " &sql +="[ViaVeiIniKM] DECIMAL(16) NULL, " &sql +="[ViaVeiFinKM] DECIMAL(16) NULL, " &sql +="[ViaVeiTotKM] DECIMAL(16) NULL, " &sql +="[ViaSts] CHAR(1) NULL, " &sql +="[ViaOriUfe] VARCHAR(2) NULL, " &sql +="[ViaOriCidCod] INT NULL, " &sql +="[ViaDesUfe] VARCHAR(2) NULL, " &sql +="[ViaDesCidCod] INT NULL, " &sql +="[RotViaCod] INT NULL, " &sql +="[ViaLanVlrTot] DECIMAL(17,2) NULL, " &sql +="[ViaCTEVlrCom] DECIMAL(17,2) NULL, " &sql +=" PRIMARY KEY ( [EmpCod],[FilCod],[ViaCod] )) " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF not EXISTS (Select * from sys.indexes where name = 'IVIAGENS1') CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IVIAGENS1] ON [Viagens] ([EmpCod],[PesCod],[VeiCod],[RotViaCod]) " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'ViagensLancamentos') CREATE TABLE [ViagensLancamentos] ( " &sql +=" [EmpCod] INT NOT NULL, " &sql +=" [FilCod] INT NOT NULL, " &sql +=" [ViaCod] INT NOT NULL, " &sql +=" [ViaLanCod] INT NOT NULL, " &sql +=" [ViaLanTip] VARCHAR(2) NULL, " &sql +=" [ViaLanStsPag] VARCHAR(1) NULL, " &sql +=" [ViaLanVlr] DECIMAL(17,2) NULL, " &sql +=" [ViaLanObs] VARCHAR(80) NULL, " &sql +=" [ViaLanDta] DATETIME NULL, " &sql +=" [ViaLanHor] VARCHAR(40) NULL, " &sql +=" [ViaLanFor] INT NULL, " &sql +=" [ViaLanNumDoc] VARCHAR(44) NULL, " &sql +=" [ViaLanQtd] DECIMAL(17,4) NULL, " &sql +=" [ViaLanVeiKm] DECIMAL(16) NULL, " &sql +=" [ViaLanComUfeCod] VARCHAR(2) NULL, " &sql +=" [ViaLanComTipC] VARCHAR(1) NULL, " &sql +=" [ViaLanComQtdC] DECIMAL(17,4) NULL, " &sql +=" [ViaLanComTipT] VARCHAR(1) NULL, " &sql +=" [ViaLanComQtdT] DECIMAL(17,4) NULL, " &sql +=" [ViaLanComTipA] VARCHAR(1) NULL, " &sql +=" [ViaLanComQtdA] DECIMAL(17,4) NULL, " &sql +=" [ViaLanSts] VARCHAR(1) NULL, " &sql +=" [ViaLanOriCtaBanCod] INT NULL, " &sql +=" [ViaLanDstCtaBanCod] INT NULL, " &sql +=" [ViaLanPlanCod] INT NULL, " &sql +=" PRIMARY KEY ( [EmpCod],[FilCod],[ViaCod],[ViaLanCod] )) " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'ViagensCargas') CREATE TABLE [ViagensCargas] ( " &sql +=" [EmpCod] INT NOT NULL, " &sql +=" [FilCod] INT NOT NULL, " &sql +=" [ViaCod] INT NOT NULL, " &sql +=" [ViaCarCod] INT NOT NULL, " &sql +=" [ViaCarCteDta] DATETIME NULL, " &sql +=" [ViaCarCteHor] VARCHAR(40) NULL, " &sql +=" [ViaCarTip] VARCHAR(2) NULL, " &sql +=" [ViaCarSts] VARCHAR(1) NULL, " &sql +=" [ViaCarCteChv] VARCHAR(44) NULL, " &sql +=" [ViaCarProPre] VARCHAR(60) NULL, " &sql +=" [ViaCarVlrFreBrt] DECIMAL(17,2) NULL, " &sql +=" [ViaCarVlrFreLiq] DECIMAL(17,2) NULL, " &sql +=" [ViaCarCteVol] DECIMAL(17,4) NULL, " &sql +=" [ViaCarCteQtd] DECIMAL(17,4) NULL, " &sql +=" [ViaCarCteTotPes] DECIMAL(17,3) NULL, " &sql +=" [ViaCarUfeOri] VARCHAR(2) NULL, " &sql +=" [ViaCarCidCodOri] INT NULL, " &sql +=" [ViaCarCteTomSer] VARCHAR(1) NULL, " &sql +=" [ViaCarCteDstCod] INT NULL, " &sql +=" [ViaCarUfeDst] VARCHAR(2) NULL, " &sql +=" [ViaCarCidCodDst] INT NULL, " &sql +=" [ViaCarMotCan] VARCHAR(100) NULL, " &sql +=" [ViaCarFun] INT NULL, " &sql +=" PRIMARY KEY ( [EmpCod],[FilCod],[ViaCod],[ViaCarCod] )) " Do 'RodaScript'

Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.438'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'EmpVerPDV') ALTER TABLE [Empresa] ADD [EmpVerPDV] VARCHAR(10) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "Update empresa set EmpVerPDV = '1'" //VERSAO PDV Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'FrpPgtoIsPedVen') ALTER TABLE [FormaPagamentos] ADD [FrpPgtoIsPedVen] VARCHAR(1) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' &sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'TCon155') alter table ConfSistema ADd TCon155 numeric(9) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' &sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'TCon156') ALTER TABLE [ConfSistema] ADD [TCon156] INT NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
//PESSOA &sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PesFrpPgtoCod') ALTER TABLE [Pessoa] ADD [PesFrpPgtoCod] INT NULL " Do 'RodaScript' //Update PESSOA &sql = "update pessoa set PesFrpPgtoCod = CAST(PesCliPedFrpTip AS NUMERIC), PesCliPedFrpTip = 0 where PesCliPedFrpTip in ('1','2','3','4','5','6','7') " Do 'RodaScript'
//PEDIDO &sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PedFrpPgtoCod') ALTER TABLE [Pedido] ADD [PedFrpPgtoCod] INT NULL " Do 'RodaScript' &sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.indexes where name = 'IPEDIDO17') CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IPEDIDO17] ON [Pedido] ([EmpCod], [PedFrpPgtoCod]) " Do 'RodaScript' //Update PEDIDO &sql = "update Pedido set PedFrpPgtoCod = CAST(PedFrpTip AS NUMERIC), PedFrpTip = 0 where PedFrpTip in ('1','2','3','4','5','6','7') " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PedCtaBanCod') ALTER TABLE [Pedido] ADD [PedCtaBanCod] INT NULL " Do 'RodaScript' //Updata PEDIDO Conta Bancaria &sql = "Update A set PedCtaBanCod = B.CbrCtaBanCod from pedido A join LocalCobranca B on A.EmpCod = B.EmpCod and A.PedCbrCod = B.CbrCod Where A.PedCbrCod > 0 and (A.PedCtaBanCod = '' or PedCtaBanCod is null) " Do 'RodaScript'
//DUPLICATA &sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'CreFrpPgtoCod') ALTER TABLE [Duplicatas] ADD [CreFrpPgtoCod] INT NULL " Do 'RodaScript' &sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.indexes where name = 'IDUPLICATAS6') CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IDUPLICATAS6] ON [Duplicatas] ([EmpCod],[CreFrpPgtoCod]) " Do 'RodaScript' //Update DUPLICATA &sql = "update Duplicatas set CreFrpPgtoCod = CAST(CreTipDup AS NUMERIC), CreTipDup = 0 where CreTipDup in ('1','2','3','4','5','6','7') " Do 'RodaScript'
//CONTA BANCARIA &sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'CtaBanPix') ALTER TABLE [Contas] ADD [CtaBanPix] VARCHAR(100) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' //##UPDATE PIX &sql = "Update A set A.CtaBanPix = B.CbrPix from Contas A join LocalCobranca B on A.EmpCod = B.EmpCod and A.CtaBanCod = B.CbrCtaBanCod where (B.CbrPix <> '' and not B.CbrPix Is null) and (A.CtaBanPix = '' or A.CtaBanPix is null) " Do 'RodaScript'
//NOTAS &sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'NfeDupFrpPgtoCod') ALTER TABLE [NotasDuplicatas] ADD [NfeDupFrpPgtoCod] INT NULL " Do 'RodaScript' &sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.indexes where name = 'INOTASDUPLICATAS') CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [INOTASDUPLICATAS] ON [NotasDuplicatas] ([EmpCod],[NfeDupFrpPgtoCod]) " Do 'RodaScript' //Update NOTAS &sql = " update NotasDuplicatas set NfeDupFrpPgtoCod = CAST(NfeDupTip AS NUMERIC), NfeDupTip = 0 where NfeDupTip in ('1','2','3','4','5','6','7') " Do 'RodaScript'
//PEDIDO PGTO &sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PedItmFrpPgtoCod') ALTER TABLE [PedidoPgto] ADD [PedItmFrpPgtoCod] INT NULL " Do 'RodaScript' &sql = " ALTER TABLE [PedidoTemporariaDuplicata] ALTER COLUMN [PedTmpTipDup] VARCHAR(2) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' &sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.indexes where name = 'IPEDIDOPGTO2') CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IPEDIDOPGTO2] ON [PedidoPgto] ([EmpCod],[PedItmFrpPgtoCod]) " Do 'RodaScript' //Update PedidoPgto &sql = "update PedidoPgto set PedItmFrpPgtoCod = CAST(PedTipFrp AS NUMERIC), PedTipFrp = 0 where PedTipFrp in ('1','2','3','4','5','6','7') " Do 'RodaScript'
//PEDIDO TEMPORARIA //DROP INDEX [UPEDIDOTEMPORARIADUPLICATA] ON [PedidoTemporariaDuplicata] &sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PedTmpFrpPgtoCod') ALTER TABLE [PedidoTemporariaDuplicata] ADD [PedTmpFrpPgtoCod] INT NULL " Do 'RodaScript' //CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [UPEDIDOTEMPORARIADUPLICATA] ON [PedidoTemporariaDuplicata] ([EmpCod],[FilCod],[PedCod],[PedTmpTipDup])
&sql = "update ConfSistema set TCon156 = CAST(TCon072 AS NUMERIC), TCon072 = '' where (TCon156 = 0 or TCon156 is null) and TCon072 <> '' " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "Update Duplicatas set CreFrpPgtoCod = 8 where CreFrpPgtoCod = 5 and CreCarCreDeb = 2 " Do 'RodaScript'
//BANDEIRAS &sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'BanCarVct') ALTER TABLE [BandeiraCartoes] ADD [BanCarVct] DATETIME NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'BanCarTip') ALTER TABLE [BandeiraCartoes] ADD [BanCarTip] VARCHAR(1) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
//REMOVE OS CAMPOS &sql = "IF EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PesCliPedFrpTip') ALTER TABLE [Pessoa] DROP COLUMN [PesCliPedFrpTip] " Do 'RodaScript' &sql = "IF EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'CbrPix') ALTER TABLE [LocalCobranca] DROP COLUMN [CbrPix] " Do 'RodaScript' &sql = "IF EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'TCon055') ALTER TABLE [ConfSistema] DROP COLUMN [TCon055] " Do 'RodaScript' &sql = "IF EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'TCon072') ALTER TABLE [ConfSistema] DROP COLUMN [TCon072] " Do 'RodaScript' &sql = "IF EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'TCon023') ALTER TABLE [ConfSistema] DROP COLUMN [TCon023] " Do 'RodaScript' EndSub

Sub 'Atualiza' for each Order ProgressId where ProgressId = &ProgressId
If (ProgressValue = 0 or ProgressValue = 100 or ProgressValue.IsNull()) or &IsRetorna = false ProgressValue = &Percentual ProgressLogXml = &sql ProgressFin = &ProgressFin ProgressIni = &Progressini Else Return EndIF When none new ProgressId = &ProgressId ProgressValue = &Percentual ProgressLogXml = &sql ProgressFin = &ProgressFin ProgressIni = &Progressini Endnew endfor
commit EndSub
parm(in:&ProgressId, in:&EmpCmp, in:&IsWeb, in:&IsRetorna, in:&Progressini, in:&ProgressFin, in:&Percentual);
